calendar.matters:
MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBERT F. COHEN, Tel No. (310) 858-9771 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY, INC.'S MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, WESTERN GRAVEL & ROOFING SUPPLY, INC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) STANDARD ROOFING COMPANY, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Eugene Lee sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $49,174.17
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $1,999.16
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $517.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,690.83
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To May-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
